description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a long, slightly curved wooden handle with a black grip section at the end, designed for two-handed use. The head of the axe is robust and painted red, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite side for striking. The handle shows signs of wear and discoloration, suggesting frequent use, and the grip area appears to be wrapped or coated for improved handling. The blade is wide and tapers to a sharp edge, suitable for chopping wood or breaking through materials. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the wooden shaft. No visible brand markings or labels are present on the axe.
description: A full-sized axe with a red, wedge-shaped blade and a long, slightly curved wooden handle with a black grip. The tool shows signs of use and is designed for heavy-duty chopping or striking tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the axe, highlighting the red blade and the long, slightly curved handle with a black grip.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the broad face of the red blade and the handle's width, with the grip end visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the axe and the attachment of the blade to the handle.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the blade's edge profile and the curvature of the handle, with the black grip and red blade clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Slightly curved wooden handle with a black, textured grip; oval cross-section; designed for two-handed use.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll; painted red; sharp edge for chopping.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the wooden handle.
